problem: How to desalinate seawater at dramatically lower energy cost than reverse osmosis?
hypothesis: Combining Bioelectrochemical system for pollutant conversion with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: Life cycle assessment with 3 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
